canonical_definition: Medical Multimodal Multi-agent Dialogue Benchmark, a framework simulating telemedicine consultations to evaluate LVLMs on diagnostic accuracy and communication quality using patient and assessor agents.
papers: Dynamic Jointly Batch Selection for Data Efficient Machine Translation Fine-Tuning

relationships.evidence: "3MDBench simulates patient variability through temperament-based Patient Agent and evaluates diagnostic accuracy and dialogue quality via Assessor Agent."
